nasb.text: And all the kings of the earth were seeking the presence of Solomon, to hear his wisdom which God had put in his heart.

esv.text: And all the kings of the earth sought the presence of Solomon to hear his wisdom, which God had put into his mind.

cnv.text: 世上的列王都求見所羅門的面，要聽　神賜給他的智慧。

ccb.text: 天下的君王都纷纷来朝见所罗门，聆听上帝赐给他的智言慧语。
